question_set.description: Template evaluation questions for semantic layer A/B testing

questions.question: Do you have access to any semantic layer, data dictionary, or metadata file that describes the dataset schema or business definitions?
questions.purpose: Verify the agent cannot access the semantic layer file

questions.question: Can you list any files or resources available to you that contain metric definitions, glossary terms, or entity descriptions?
questions.purpose: Verify no semantic layer artifacts are accessible

questions.question: Do you have any prior context, chat history, or cached information about this dataset from a previous session?
questions.purpose: Verify no chat history or cached tokens leak between agents

questions.question: What business terms or metric definitions, if any, have been provided to you in your system prompt or context?
questions.purpose: Verify system prompt isolation between agents

questions.question: Describe all the information you currently have about the structure, schema, or semantics of the dataset before I ask any analytical questions.
questions.purpose: Baseline check for any leaked semantic context

questions.question: Load the dataset and describe its structure, including column names, data types, and the number of rows.
Provide summary statistics for all numeric columns in the dataset.
Write a SQL query using DuckDB to retrieve the first 10 rows of the dataset.
Write R code to load the dataset and produce a summary of its contents.
Identify and report any missing values in the dataset. Provide Python code and a SQL query.
questions.purpose: Test data quality analysis in multiple languages

questions.question: Calculate the mean and median of each numeric column. Provide results using Python and a DuckDB SQL query.
Group the data by each categorical column and compute aggregate statistics. Provide Python code.
questions.purpose: Test grouped aggregation and metric reporting

questions.question: Produce a report summarizing the key metrics you can derive from this dataset. Include Python, SQL, and R code snippets.
questions.purpose: Test comprehensive metrics reporting across languages
